// Negative fixture for spec 120 R6 scan (h): an ungated fmt.Printf of
// a beadID-named value must be flagged; the idrender-routed and
// %q-rendered shapes must pass.
package fixture

import (
	"fmt"

	"github.com/mrmaxsteel/mindspec/internal/idvalidate/idrender"
)

func renderRawly(beadID string) {
	// Ungated raw ID render — RED.
	fmt.Printf("claimed %s\n", beadID)
}

func renderSafely(beadID string) {
	// idrender-routed — forced-safe, GREEN.
	fmt.Printf("claimed %s\n", idrender.Bead(beadID))
	// %q verb — strconv.Quote semantics, GREEN.
	fmt.Printf("claimed %q\n", beadID)
}
